meta.title: Career-Change Courses into Tech — TechTelligence
meta.description: Break into tech with no prior experience: tracks for Dev, Data and DevOps roles, built by the team that ships Data & AI for companies. Access the platform and start now.

hero.title: Your transition into tech starts here
hero.subtitle: Courses for people building a tech career from zero — no prior experience, no CS degree. You learn what the market actually hires for, from a team that builds Data & AI every day.

whoFor.title: Built for people starting from zero
whoFor.subtitle: Whether you're coming from another field, fresh out of school, or have never worked before: you don't need prior experience or a degree in tech. You need the will to climb.

personas.title: Career changers
personas.text: You work in sales, healthcare, law, manufacturing — any field — and want a clear path into technology.

personas.title: Fresh out of university
personas.text: Finished your degree — in any field — and haven't landed a career yet? Point your education at a market that hires fast and pays well, with no CS diploma required.

personas.title: Starting your first job
personas.text: Never worked before? Whether you're a teenager, still in school or just out of it, tech is one of the few fields that opens the door without demanding experience — just the will to learn.

personas.title: No CS degree
personas.text: A computer science degree is not a prerequisite. Our courses start from absolute zero and build the foundation the market demands.

personas.title: People restarting
personas.text: If your career has stalled or you want a fresh start, tech is one of the fields that opens the most doors for those who prepare.

personas.title: Looking for more freedom
personas.text: Better pay, remote work and continuous growth: you prepare for a market that rewards people who can build.

tracks.title: Tracks for the roles the market hires
tracks.subtitle: Our courses prepare you for the main roles in tech. You build the foundation first, then go deep in the track you choose.
tracks.disclaimer: Example tracks — full curriculum coming soon

items.title: Dev
items.text: Become the person who builds software: logic, programming and real projects from day one.

items.title: Front-end
items.text: Create the interfaces people use every day: fast, beautiful, accessible websites and applications.

items.title: Back-end
items.text: Build the invisible part that holds everything up: APIs, databases and systems that survive the real world.

items.title: DevOps
items.text: Automate, deploy and keep systems running — the bridge between code and operations.

items.title: Data Engineering
items.text: Build the pipelines and platforms that turn raw data into reliable information.

items.title: Data Analytics
items.text: Turn data into answers: dashboards, metrics and decisions driven by evidence.

items.title: Data Science
items.text: Go beyond analysis: models, predictions and the path to working with AI.

items.title: And other roles
items.text: Tech is a broad market. We help you find the role that best fits your profile.

method.title: Taught by the people who build
method.text: TechTelligence implements data platforms and AI environments for companies. That day-to-day work defines what goes into our courses: you learn what the market hires for — no filler content.

items.title: From absolute zero
items.text: No prerequisites. Our courses assume you've never written a line of code.

items.title: Focused on what the market hires
items.text: The content comes from the real projects we deliver for companies — you study what job openings actually ask for.

items.title: Hands-on from day one

meta.title: About TechTelligence — Those who build, teach
meta.description: Meet TechTelligence: we were born building Data & AI solutions for companies — the practice that powers our consulting and becomes our courses and mentorship.

hero.title: Those who build, teach
hero.subtitle: TechTelligence was born inside real Data & AI projects. Everything we teach and deliver comes from there: from what the market actually builds, hires for and values.

story.title: Two sides of the same problem
paragraphs: TechTelligence was born inside Data & AI projects for companies. Working on those projects, we saw two sides of the same problem: companies struggling to find well-prepared professionals — and people wanting to break into tech with no idea where to start.

On one side, teams and platforms in need of qualified people. On the other, talented people going in circles through generic courses, with no map leading to an actual job. We decided to build that bridge.

That's why everything here starts from practice: what we learn implementing solutions for companies shapes our consulting, our courses and our mentorship. The market shows us the way — and we teach you how to walk it.

founder.text: The people behind TechTelligence build Data & AI solutions every day — soon, you'll get to know this story up close.

values.title: What we believe in
values.subtitle: Four principles guide everything we do — from the first exercise in a course to the delivery of a consulting project.

items.title: Learning by doing
items.description: Nobody learns technology just by watching lectures. Here, you build real projects from step one — because that's how the market evaluates who it hires.

items.title: The market as our compass
items.description: We don't teach what's trendy: we teach what companies actually use and hire for. Our consulting projects keep that compass calibrated.

items.title: Transparency, always
items.description: No magic promises, no shortcuts that don't exist. We're upfront about the effort the transition takes — and we stay by your side throughout the climb.

items.title: Always climbing
items.description: Technology is a mountain that never stops growing. We keep studying, building and evolving every day — and that's what we hope to inspire in you.

ecosystem.title: Three products, one foundation
ecosystem.subtitle: What we build in consulting becomes content in the courses and direction in mentorship. Each product strengthens the others — and you're the one who wins.

course.title: Courses
course.description: Your door into tech, with tracks guided by what the market actually hires for.

mentorship.title: Mentorship
mentorship.description: 1:1 guidance to land your next role or accelerate your career in tech.

consulting.description: Data platforms and AI environments for companies — from strategy to production.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — TechTelligence
meta.description: Learn what data the TechTelligence website collects, how we use it, which cookies exist, and how to exercise your rights under Brazil's LGPD.

header.title: Privacy Policy
intro: This policy explains, in plain language, what personal data this website collects, why, and what we do (and don't do) with it — in compliance with Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD, Law No. 13,709/2018).

The short version: this is an informational website. You don't create an account, you don't log in, and you are not tracked by ads. The only personal data we receive is what you choose to send us to get in touch.

dataCollected.title: What data we collect
body: The website has no sign-up and no user accounts. The personal data we may receive comes from two situations, always initiated by you:
items: Contact form: your name, email address and the content of your message.
WhatsApp: when you click a WhatsApp button, the conversation happens inside the app, under WhatsApp's own privacy policy.

howWeUse.title: How we use your data
body: We use your name, email and message for a single purpose: understanding your request and replying to you.
We don't add your email to marketing lists, we don't sell your data, and we don't share it with third parties for advertising.

storage.title: Where your data lives (and where it doesn't)
body: When you submit the contact form, your message is validated, checked for spam by Cloudflare Turnstile, and delivered to our inbox by the Resend email platform.
The website does not store these messages in any database. In other words: your message exists only in our email inbox.

retention.title: How long we keep it
body: We keep the emails we receive only for as long as needed to handle your request. After that, they can be deleted. If you'd like your message deleted sooner, just ask — we explain how below.

cookies.title: Cookies
body: The website uses a single functional cookie, called NEXT_LOCALE, which remembers the language you chose (Portuguese or English). It does not identify you and does not track your browsing.
We do not use advertising, behavioral analytics, or third-party tracking cookies in this version of the website.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure and security
body: The website runs on Cloudflare's infrastructure, which processes technical data — such as your connection's IP address — for security, protection against attacks (such as DDoS), and content delivery. This processing is standard practice on the modern web and keeps the site safe and available.
Cloudflare Turnstile, used on the contact form to block bots, may also process technical data from your browser during that verification.

rights.title: Your rights under the LGPD
body: As a data subject, the LGPD grants you, among others, the right to:
items: Confirm whether we process data about you
Access the data we hold about you
Correct incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data
Request the deletion or anonymization of your data
Request the portability of your data to another provider
Know who we share your data with
Withdraw consent you previously gave

exercise.title: How to exercise your rights
body: No red tape: send an email to <email>contato@techtelligence.com.br</email> telling us what you need. We'll reply as quickly as possible.
If you're not satisfied with our response, you can also file a complaint with Brazil's National Data Protection Authority (ANPD).

changes.title: Changes to this policy
body: We may update this policy when the website gains new features or when the law requires it. When that happens, we update the date at the top of this page. The version published here always applies.
